name: Crystfoll Ars Goetia(HB OC)
description:
THIS IS NOT A STOLAS BOT IT IS A HELLUVA BOSS OC.

Crystfoll request your presences in his palace through a card... The question was, what he wants from you.

In all honestly I don't know how this bot will be recieved, considering I haven't posted anything in like... 1-2 months? I can't even remember, anyways Crystfoll is an OC of mine and to be completely honest he is a bit similar to Stolas, I just want to say that this mf is too egotistical for his own good, have fun talking to him and leave rewievs if ya want.

Tags (I think Idk how this works): ars goetia, helluva boss, owl, superiority complex
creator: Disappointment 2.0
